cooldown.wait: ⏳ Please wait {time}s before using this command again.

permission.denied: ❌ You don't have permission to use this command (Required: {permission}).

command.unknown: Command not found! Send "{prefix}help" to see available commands.
command.no_permission: ❌ You don't have permission to use this command.

cancel.description: Cancel a pending command or session
cancel.empty: ⚠️ You have no pending operations to cancel.

eval.no_code: ⚠️ Please enter JS code to execute.

permission.not_group: ❌ This command can only be used in groups.
permission.user_not_found: ❌ User not found. Please @tag or enter a UID.
permission.need_leader: ❌ You must be a Group Leader or Bot Admin to assign Virtual Deputy roles.
permission.deputy_added: ✅ Virtual Deputy role granted to UID: {uid}
permission.deputy_already: ⚠️ UID {uid} is already a Virtual Deputy.
permission.deputy_removed: ✅ Virtual Deputy role revoked from UID: {uid}
permission.deputy_not_found: ⚠️ UID {uid} is not a Virtual Deputy.
permission.help_guide:
🛠 Usage guide for /permission:
- /permission deputy add <@tag/uid>
- /permission deputy remove <@tag/uid>
- /permission list
- /permission view <@tag/uid>

ping.description: Check if the bot is alive

reload.success_all:
✅ Successfully reloaded {count} plugins.
⚠️ **WARNING**: Excessive reloading may cause memory leaks (consider using /restart instead).
reload.failed: ❌ Failed to reload plugins. Check logs for details.

update.description: Check or apply alden-bot runtime updates
update.apply_requires_launcher: ⚠️ Automatic update requires the launcher. Start the bot with pnpm start or an equivalent package manager command, then run /update apply again.
update.apply_unsupported_docker: ⚠️ Automatic in-container update is not supported. Update Docker by rebuilding or pulling the image, then run docker compose up -d.
update.apply_missing_assets: ⚠️ Release v{version} cannot be applied automatically because it is missing the ZIP asset or SHA256 checksum.
update.apply_started: 🔄 Update to v{version} is starting. The bot will stop, update through the launcher, then start again.
